rationale.root_cause: Model diagnosed defect at line 752 (unop_error call) instead of the required location 743; it misidentified the bug as a missing ~ handler rather than the actual defect.
rationale.local_fix: Suggested fix (add handler for ~) does not match the registered patch, which changes only the integer case inside FLIP from -a->v.i to ~a->v.i at the exact site.
rationale.global_fix: Explanation claims missing implementation and unop_error dispatch, but the actual root cause is a copy-paste error in the FLIP integer branch (using negation instead of complement); does not demonstrate understanding of the defect.
